psalm-109-1.verse:
O God of my praise,
  Do not be silent!
psalm-109-1.prayer: Lord, do not be silent when I bring my pain, confusion, and burdens before You. Help me trust that You hear me.

psalm-109-2.verse:
For they have opened the wicked and deceitful mouth against me;
  They have spoken against me with a lying tongue.
psalm-109-2.prayer: Father, protect me from lies, false accusations, and harmful words. Keep my heart anchored in Your truth.

psalm-109-3.verse:
They have also surrounded me with words of hatred,
  And fought against me without cause.
psalm-109-3.prayer: Lord, when words of hatred surround me, help me respond with faith, wisdom, and restraint.

psalm-109-4.verse:
In return for my love they act as my accusers;
  But I am in prayer.
psalm-109-4.prayer: Father, when I am opposed despite love, teach me to remain prayerful and faithful before You.

psalm-109-5.verse:
Thus they have repaid me evil for good
  And hatred for my love.
psalm-109-5.prayer: Lord, when good is repaid with evil, guard my heart from bitterness and help me continue walking in righteousness.

psalm-109-6.verse:
Appoint a wicked man over him,
  And let an accuser stand at his right hand.
psalm-109-6.prayer: Father, I leave every injustice in Your hands. Keep me from revenge and help me trust Your judgment.

psalm-109-7.verse:
When he is judged, let him come forth guilty,
  And let his prayer become sin.
psalm-109-7.prayer: Lord, when judgment is needed, let it be according to Your righteousness, wisdom, and truth.

psalm-109-8.verse:
Let his days be few;
  Let another take his office.
psalm-109-8.prayer: Father, remind me that every role, season, and responsibility is held under Your authority.

psalm-109-9.verse:
Let his children be fatherless
  And his wife a widow.
psalm-109-9.prayer: Lord, have mercy on families affected by sin, injustice, or brokenness. Bring healing where there has been pain.

psalm-109-10.verse:
Let his children wander about and beg;
  And let them seek sustenance far from their ruined homes.
psalm-109-10.prayer: Father, protect children and future generations from the consequences of wrongdoing. Let Your mercy intervene.

psalm-109-11.verse:
Let the creditor seize all that he has,
  And let strangers plunder the product of his labor.
psalm-109-11.prayer: Lord, guard homes and lives from loss, shame, and destruction. Restore what has been damaged by sin.

psalm-109-12.verse:
Let there be none to extend lovingkindness to him,
  Nor any to be gracious to his fatherless children.
psalm-109-12.prayer: Father, raise up compassion where mercy has been absent. Teach me to show kindness where it is needed.

psalm-109-13.verse:
Let his posterity be cut off;
  In a following generation let their name be blotted out.
psalm-109-13.prayer: Lord, break destructive patterns and replace them with repentance, healing, and righteousness.

psalm-109-14.verse:
Let the iniquity of his fathers be remembered before the Lord,
  And do not let the sin of his mother be blotted out.
psalm-109-14.prayer: Father, heal generational wounds and lead families into forgiveness, truth, and restoration.

psalm-109-15.verse:
Let them be before the Lord continually,
  That He may cut off their memory from the earth;
psalm-109-15.prayer: Lord, You remember all things with perfect justice. Help me trust Your wisdom without carrying judgment myself.

psalm-109-16.verse:
Because he did not remember to show lovingkindness,
  But persecuted the afflicted and needy man,
  And the despondent in heart, to put them to death.
psalm-109-16.prayer: Father, make me attentive to the poor, needy, and brokenhearted. Help me never add to someone’s pain.

psalm-109-17.verse:
He also loved cursing, so it came to him;
  And he did not delight in blessing, so it was far from him.
psalm-109-17.prayer: Lord, keep me from loving curses, bitterness, or harm. Fill my heart with blessing, mercy, and truth.

psalm-109-18.verse:
But he clothed himself with cursing as with his garment,
  And it entered into his body like water
  And like oil into his bones.
psalm-109-18.prayer: Father, remove anything destructive that has entered my heart, words, or habits. Clothe me with righteousness.

psalm-109-19.verse:
Let it be to him as a garment with which he covers himself,
  And for a belt with which he constantly girds himself.
psalm-109-19.prayer: Lord, let my life be covered not with bitterness, but with humility, grace, and obedience.

psalm-109-20.verse:
Let this be the reward of my accusers from the Lord,
  And of those who speak evil against my soul.
psalm-109-20.prayer: Father, I entrust every accusation, every hurt, and every injustice to You, the righteous Judge.

psalm-109-21.verse:
But You, O God, the Lord, deal kindly with me for Your name’s sake;
  Because Your lovingkindness is good, deliver me;
psalm-109-21.prayer: Lord, deal kindly with me for Your name’s sake. Deliver me according to Your good and faithful love.

psalm-109-22.verse:
For I am afflicted and needy,
  And my heart is wounded within me.
psalm-109-22.prayer: Father, when I feel poor, needy, or wounded inside, draw near and comfort my heart.

psalm-109-23.verse:
I am passing like a shadow when it lengthens;
  I am shaken off like the locust.
psalm-109-23.prayer: Lord, when I feel like I am fading or being shaken, steady me with Your presence and strength.

psalm-109-24.verse:
My knees are weak from fasting,
  And my flesh has grown lean, without fatness.
psalm-109-24.prayer: Father, when my body or spirit feels weak, sustain me by Your mercy and renew my strength.

psalm-109-25.verse:
I also have become a reproach to them;
  When they see me, they wag their head.
psalm-109-25.prayer: Lord, when I feel mocked or misunderstood, remind me that my worth and identity are secure in You.

psalm-109-26.verse:
Help me, O Lord my God;
  Save me according to Your lovingkindness.
psalm-109-26.prayer: Father, help me, my God. Save me according to Your lovingkindness.

psalm-109-27.verse:
And let them know that this is Your hand;
  You, Lord, have done it.
psalm-109-27.prayer: Lord, let Your hand be seen in my life so others may know that You are my helper and deliverer.

psalm-109-28.prayer: Father, even if others curse, let Your blessing rest upon me. Keep my heart joyful and secure in You.

psalm-109-29.verse:
Let my accusers be clothed with dishonor,
  And let them cover themselves with their own shame as with a robe.
psalm-109-29.prayer: Lord, cover shame, accusation, and opposition with Your justice, mercy, and protection.

psalm-109-30.verse:
With my mouth I will give thanks abundantly to the Lord;
  And in the midst of many I will praise Him.
psalm-109-30.prayer: Father, help me give thanks to You abundantly and praise You openly among others.

psalm-109-31.verse:
For He stands at the right hand of the needy,
  To save him from those who judge his soul.
psalm-109-31.prayer: Lord, thank You for standing at the right hand of the needy and saving those who are judged unfairly.

psalm-109-closing.prayer:
Lord, thank You for hearing me when I face accusation, pain, injustice, or weakness. Guard my heart from bitterness, revenge, and fear. Teach me to pray faithfully, trust Your justice, and walk in mercy and truth. Defend the needy, heal what is broken, and let Your blessing rest where others bring harm. May my life give thanks to You and remain secure in Your lovingkindness.

In Jesus’ name, Amen.
